$schema_note: SHARED cross-department SOP manifest for the Signature Funnel engine (Skill 49). This is the universal-sops face of the capability: it is how ANY department (web-development / marketing / crm / sales / social-media) discovers and drives the end-to-end funnel pipeline. It does NOT re-implement the engine. The authoritative machine spine lives in the skill: 49-signature-funnel/FUNNEL-MANIFEST.json (phase order P0..P10 + AF codes), 49-signature-funnel/scripts/prove_sf_*.py (the five fail-closed floor provers), 49-signature-funnel/run_signature_funnel.py (the deterministic orchestrator, front-door-nonce gated by signature-funnel-entry.sh), and the SACRED IP in 49-signature-funnel/MASTERDOC.md + structure/funnel_structure.json. This file mirrors the email-craft / fb-ad-craft / presentation-slide-craft enforcement-spine pattern so a department reads ONE manifest to know the phases, the owning roles, the SOP for each phase, and the gate codes. SOP-LOCKED: any added/changed SOP, section band, or gate MUST stay in lockstep with 49-signature-funnel/FUNNEL-MANIFEST.json and the provers.

step0_engine_selector.note: Requests route to an engine via the shared STEP-0 funnel-engine selector. NO_ENGINE_MATCH falls through to the template-first funnel matcher. Skill 56 (Sales-Page-Assets) is now the 2nd registered engine (the Direct-Response sibling) — see direct_response_sibling below.

direct_response_sibling.note: The Direct-Response sibling of Skill 49 (the DR sales-page / VSL family): the 8-section main A/B + countdown, the Trevor Otts 9-section upsell A/B, the downsell, the Sovereign Architect high-ticket long-form (6,500-7,100 words), the 40-80-word bump copy, and the slice-covered image plan — its own eight fail-closed model-free provers (prove_sp_*.py) and its own P0..P9 spine. It SHARES this funnel-craft SOP cluster and the ONE labeling grammar (56 OWNS it), rides the SAME STEP-0 selector, and DELEGATES all GHL media + build to Skill 6 (the ONE delivery rail) + the bump to Skill 44. Do NOT drive the DR stack through the Skill-49 provers; use 56-sales-page-assets/sales-page-assets-entry.sh.

delivery_rail.rule: Skill 6 is the ONE GHL delivery rail. Skill 49 AUTHORS copy+images, then DELEGATES: P4 media folder + upload -> ghl_media.py; P7 funnel/step/page build + HTML injection -> ghl_rest_canvas.py / ghl_builder.py.

phases.name: Lock the brief in ONE block
Image prompts (5,000–19,000 chars, 8-block, Signature Grade Block)
GHL media folder + upload (DELEGATED to Skill 6)
GHL funnel/page build (DELEGATED to Skill 6); QC >= 8.5
Optional 10 landing-page promo emails (handoff)
phases.note: After the downsell is approved: offer the 10 promo emails; on yes, hand the locked brief + final copy to the Email Engine.

labeling_grammar.reciprocal_pin: 49-signature-funnel/MASTERDOC.md §8 <-> 56-sales-page-assets/structure/labeling-grammar.json (Skill 56 OWNS the shared grammar; both engines share stage/type vocabulary, DR extends stage with bump/high-ticket and type with img/funnel/brief/manifest/cert)

client_runtime_rule: On a client box the engine uses the CLIENT's OWN configured providers + keys (strongest -> copy + QC verify; mid -> image prompts / HTML / JSON; cheapest -> catalog / poll). NEVER Anthropic / claude-* / operator keys. The provers are deterministic and model-free.
flexibility: guide-not-rule: honor an explicit owner choice about funnel size + offers; but the SACRED section bands + image-prompt band are prover-enforced hard AF codes, not opinions.
